label: CU loop • read two on-screen values and report both
query: What is the order number and the order total shown on screen? Report both.
notes: Grounded multi-read: the answer never lands in the tree, so the model must surface BOTH values in its closing reason. finalSummaryContains pins the exact order number and total — a partial read (one value) or a fabricated number fails. Live; tiny-context models SKIP.
